title: Thirst
author: Scott Harrison
subline: A story of redemption, compassion, and a mission to bring clean water to the world.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A single large water drop. Inside the drop, a tiny village (3 small huts) and a small red dot at the top — the only fresh water source. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Water drop shape: a teardrop with a sharp top, rounded bottom -->
    <path d="M 0 -500 Q -260 0 -260 220 A 260 260 0 0 0 260 220 Q 260 0 0 -500 Z" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <path d="M 0 -480 Q -240 0 -240 220 A 240 240 0 0 0 240 220 Q 240 0 0 -480 Z" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <!-- The water level inside the drop -->
    <line x1="-240" y1="80" x2="240" y2="80" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
    <!-- 3 small huts on the ground -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <g transform="translate(-130 130)">
        <line x1="-25" y1="0" x2="-25" y2="50"/>
        <line x1="25" y1="0" x2="25" y2="50"/>
        <line x1="-25" y1="0" x2="25" y2="0"/>
        <path d="M -30 0 L 0 -25 L 30 0"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(0 100)">
        <line x1="-25" y1="0" x2="-25" y2="50"/>
        <line x1="25" y1="0" x2="25" y2="50"/>
        <line x1="-25" y1="0" x2="25" y2="0"/>
        <path d="M -30 0 L 0 -25 L 30 0"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(130 130)">
        <line x1="-25" y1="0" x2="-25" y2="50"/>
        <line x1="25" y1="0" x2="25" y2="50"/>
        <line x1="-25" y1="0" x2="25" y2="0"/>
        <path d="M -30 0 L 0 -25 L 30 0"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- The water source at the top (the tip of the drop, but inverted to be at the source) — RED drop with a tiny pipe -->
    <g transform="translate(0 -400)">
      <rect x="-20" y="0" width="40" height="40" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <rect x="-12" y="40" width="24" height="40" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="92" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Caption -->
    <text x="0" y="600" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">16 MILLION PEOPLE · ONE MISSION</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A giant hairline water drop occupies the lower 2/3. Inside the drop: a tiny village (3 small huts) at the water line, and at the very tip a small RED water-source rectangle with a single drop. The drop is full of people, but the water comes from one red source. Title 560px mixed case, single word 'Thirst', weight 300. The composition is the book's mission made literal.
